# Dynamic Stylz Salon

> Warm, welcoming hair salon at 313 W Main St, Elma, WA 98541. Cuts, color, balayage, highlights, perms, kids' haircuts, event styling, brows, and sensory-friendly appointments. Owned and operated by Amber Aho, master stylist with 23+ years of styling experience. Established 2022 in downtown Elma. Serving Elma, Montesano, McCleary, Aberdeen, Hoquiam, Satsop, Oakville, Malone, and Porter — the greater Grays Harbor County, Washington area.

Phone: (360) 581-2428
Address: 313 W Main St, Elma, WA 98541
Hours: Monday–Thursday 10am–5pm, Friday 10am–4pm, Saturday–Sunday closed.

## Services

- [Women's Cuts & Styling](https://dynamicstylz.com/#services): Lobs, layers, blowouts, and silky finishes — shaped to how you wear it day to day. Priced by consultation.
- [Color & Highlights](https://dynamicstylz.com/#services): All-over color, balayage, dimensional highlights, and gentle gray blending — mapped to your skin tone. Priced by consultation.
- [Perms & Texture](https://dynamicstylz.com/#services): Classic perms and soft modern waves — movement tailored to your hair type and lifestyle. Priced by consultation.
- [Kids' Cuts & First Chairs](https://dynamicstylz.com/#services): First haircuts, back-to-school trims, and sensory-friendly appointments — calm pace, gentle tools.
- [Men's Cuts & Clean-Ups](https://dynamicstylz.com/#services): Fades, tapers, clipper cuts, and classic scissor work — quick, precise, Monday-morning ready.
- [Event Styling, Brows & Makeup](https://dynamicstylz.com/#services): Weddings, prom, homecoming — updos, brows, and makeup that hold through the dance floor.

Every service begins with a complimentary consultation. Pricing varies by length, density, and time in the chair — text (360) 581-2428 for a quote.

## Stylists

- [Amber Aho](https://dynamicstylz.com/#about): Owner and master stylist. 23+ years of styling experience. Specializes in dimensional color, balayage, sensory-friendly appointments, and first-chair kids' cuts.

## Service Area

Elma, Montesano, McCleary, Aberdeen, Hoquiam, Satsop, Oakville, Malone, and Porter — all located in Grays Harbor County, Washington.

## Accommodations

- Sensory-friendly appointments available by request — dimmed lights, minimal small talk, no pressure. Welcome for kids and adults.
- Walk-ins welcome when a chair is open; appointments strongly recommended for color, balayage, and perms.
- Family-friendly environment — all ages, all styles.
- Free consultations always included.
- Payment: cash, debit, and all major credit cards accepted.

## Frequently Asked Questions

- [Where is Dynamic Stylz Salon located?](https://dynamicstylz.com/#faq) 313 W Main St in downtown Elma, WA — third door from Dollar Tree, with free alley parking behind the building.
- [How do I book an appointment?](https://dynamicstylz.com/#faq) Call or text (360) 581-2428, or message the Facebook page.
- [Do you do balayage and highlights?](https://dynamicstylz.com/#faq) Yes — Amber specializes in dimensional, lived-in color. Free consultation to match the technique to your hair.
- [Do you cut kids' hair?](https://dynamicstylz.com/#faq) Yes — first haircuts are a specialty, and sensory-friendly appointments are available on request.
- [Do you offer sensory-friendly appointments?](https://dynamicstylz.com/#faq) Yes. Mention it when you book — lower lighting, minimal small talk, no pressure.
